<!-- Auto-generated by the wheelsys-deep-audit workflow (public sources only, clean-room). 13/15 topics (customers+billing search agents hit a transient 529; their content is still partly covered via other angles). Cross-reference with the in-app audit before relying on any figure. -->

# Wheelsys (Wheels Car Rental System) — Functional Spec for an Equivalent Multi-Tenant SaaS

> **Scope & method note.** This spec is reverse-engineered from public marketing pages, partner/integration announcements, third-party review/directory listings, Greek financial press, business-registry mirrors, and live Wheelsys-hosted tenant pages. The large majority of primary source pages were egress-blocked (HTTP 403/CONNECT-policy denial, or DNS failure) during research, so most "official" facts were assembled from search-engine snippets rather than full-page reads. Numbers conflict across sources and are flagged inline. Every unconfirmed item is consolidated in the final **GAPS — must confirm in-app** section.
>
> **Confidence tags:** **[official]** (vendor copy or first-party deal/registry/legal-advisor source), **[secondary]** (review sites / partners / press / directory aggregators), **[inferred]** (reasoned deduction), **[unverified]** (single weak source, third-party estimate, or possible wrong-entity).
>
> **Critical disambiguation (applies throughout).** "**Wheelsys**" / "**Wheels Car Rental System**" (wheelsys.com, Athens, Greece) is the subject of this spec. It is a *different company* from "**Wheels, Inc.**" (wheels.com, Chicago, US corporate fleet leasing). Facts about the "Wheels Mobile Assistant" app, the OutSystems case study, and FleetView/IFRS leasing reporting belong to **Wheels, Inc.** and are **excluded** from the Wheelsys feature set except where explicitly noted as a disambiguation warning **[secondary]** (https://apps.apple.com/us/app/wheels-mobile-assistant/id1285672691).

---

## 1) Executive summary & product overview

Wheelsys S.A. is a Greek-origin, cloud-based (SaaS subscription) car-rental management platform; the product brand is **"Wheels Car Rental System"** (slogan "We move as a team") **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/). It is positioned end-to-end across **car rental, operating leasing, fleet management, self-service automation, and customer experience** — "from reservations to invoicing — and everything in between" **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/).

- **Origin / HQ:** Founded **2004** (one older source says 2003 — conflict); HQ at **9 Levadeias St (Λεβαδείας 9), Metamorfosi, Athens, Attica, 14452, Greece** **[secondary]** (https://www.dnb.com/business-directory/company-profiles.wheelsys_sa.50b33cccacbadca2f1255759ff515509.html). Legal entity **WHEELSYS Α.Ε. (S.A.)**; founder/CEO/Managing Director **Vassilis Devletoglou** **[secondary]** (https://wheelsys.com/about-us/; https://halcyonequitypartners.com/halcyon-equity-partners-announces-strategic-investment-in-wheelsys-s-a/). Presence cited in Greece, UK, US, Cyprus; Cyprus branch under legacy "Invensys" brand (App Store publisher "Invensys"; SourceForge vendor "Invensys") **[secondary]** (https://sourceforge.net/software/product/Wheels-Car-Rental/).
- **Registry identifiers:** ΓΕΜΗ (General Commercial Registry) number **601000259920** for WHEELSYS Α.Ε.; a related **WHEELSYS LTD** carries ΓΕΜΗ **300000591078** (3000… prefix → typically a foreign company/branch registered in Greece); a separate **WHEELSYS LTD** is registered in **Cyprus** (OpenCorporates HE294355, incorporated 26 Sep 2011, Active) **[secondary]** (https://findbiz.gr/el/company/wheelsys-sa/601000259920). Contact: sales@wheelsys.com, +30 210 92 40 904 **[secondary]** (https://wheelsys.com/about-us/).
- **Investment:** **Halcyon Equity Partners S.C.A. SICAR** (AIFM; AUM >€170M) made a **strategic minority** growth-capital investment in Wheelsys S.A., announced **~26 March 2025** (legal completion April 2025), under Halcyon's "Invest in the Best of Greece" strategy. **Deal amount, valuation, and exact stake percentage were NOT disclosed** by any party or press (including capital.gr). Advisors: **Kyriakides Georgopoulos (KG) Law Firm** for Wheelsys (target); **Lambadarios Law Firm** for Halcyon (investor) **[official]** (https://halcyonequitypartners.com/halcyon-equity-partners-announces-strategic-investment-in-wheelsys-s-a/; https://kglawfirm.gr/kg-advises-wheels-car-rental-system-on-strategic-investment-by-halcyon-equity-partners/; https://www.euro2day.gr/news/enterprises/article/2291828/meiopshfiko-pososto-sth-wheelsys-sa-apekthse-to-ha.html).
- **Workforce & revenue (third-party estimates, unverified):** ~**37–50 employees** (sources cite 37, 44, or "11–50"); estimated annual revenue ~**USD 4.0M–5.4M** — data-vendor estimates (RocketReach/ZoomInfo/CB Insights class), **not** the filed ισολογισμός **[unverified]** (https://rocketreach.co/wheels-car-rental-system-profile_b45c12c6fc6f7094; https://www.cbinsights.com/company/wheels-car-rental-system).
- **Scale (conflicting marketing snapshots):** Homepage **1,300+ operators / 120+ countries**; About page **1,200+ / 110+**; Halcyon release **1,000+ / 100+**; older listings **800 / 76**; one feature page **4,000+ locations / 82 countries** **[official/secondary]** (https://wheelsys.com/; https://halcyonequitypartners.com/...).
- **Fleet scale claim:** scales from **50 vehicles to 50,000+** **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/).
- **Hosting:** Fully web-based cloud subscription; no local install; auto-updates during off-peak hours **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/cloud/). Directory listings classify it as cloud/web-based only (no advertised on-prem) **[secondary]** (https://www.capterra.com/p/141312/Wheels-Car-Rental/).
- **Target market:** Car-rental companies and operating-leasing operators of every size — independents, affiliate-program members, brand licensees/franchisees (Green Motion; franchisees of Europcar, Avis, Sixt, Payless, Hertz, Budget, Enterprise, National/Alamo), large airport operations, multi-country franchise networks **[official/secondary]** (https://wheelsys.com/; https://halcyonequitypartners.com/...).

**Product-design takeaway for an equivalent SaaS:** build a **multi-tenant rental ERP** whose pricing/availability is **server-authoritative** and distributed in real time to all channels; layer fleet, leasing, self-service, and field-service modules on a shared data core. The live-tenant evidence (Section 4/7) confirms a **per-tenant terms & fee model** — each operator sets its own deposit/fuel/one-way/after-hours rules — so the platform must treat fee/policy schedules as **tenant-scoped configuration**, not global constants.

---

## 2) Full module / menu map

Core and adjacent modules surfaced across sources **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/):

| Module | Status | Key scope |
|---|---|---|
| **Car Rental (Operations / Counter)** | Core | Reservations → contract closure; check-in/out; contract gen; payments; customer comms |
| **Reservations / Booking** | Core | Centralizes website, mobile app, OTA, broker, corporate, walk-in |
| **Booking Engine** | Core | Customer-facing online channel + real-time rate engine |
| **Pricing / Rate Management** | Core | Rate plans/codes, seasons, agreements, dynamic rates |
| **Yield / Real-time Pricing ("WeYield")** | Core | Utilization-linked rate shift, AI forecasting |
| **Fleet Management** | Core | Maintenance, insurance, green cards, vehicle orders, inspections, allocation, cost control, telematics |
| **Field Service** | Distinct module | Field inspection/turnaround, fleet movements, claim recording (web app) |
| **Self-Service (kiosks)** | Module | 24/7 unattended check-in/pay/sign/key pickup |
| **Customer Management / CRM** | Core (packaging unclear) | Customer profiles, document storage |
| **Reporting & Analytics** | Core | Drag-drop reports, dashboards, notifications, Power BI feed |
| **Integrations / Connections** | Core | 13 named connection categories |
| **Operating Leasing** | **Sold separately** | Costing, quotes, contracts & addendums, billing, IFRS |
| **Franchise & Affiliate Management** | **Available separately** | Markups, overrides, monthly statements, bi-directional XML |
| **Wheelsys Academy** | Support | On-demand training/video |

**GAP:** exact menu taxonomy and which modules are bundled vs. licensed add-ons is not fully enumerated publicly.

---

## 3) Reservations & booking workflow + statuses + online booking engine

**Confirmed:**
- Centralizes reservations from website, mobile app, OTAs, brokers, corporate clients, walk-ins, **in real time**, with full visibility of availability/pricing/fleet status **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/booking-engine/).
- **Booking engine** is embed-installed via a code/CSS snippet (one-step install on CMS or hand-coded sites), **fully customizable, 100% responsive, multi-currency, multi-language**, with a renter login portal, multiple payment gateways, **full Wheelsys API** for real-time pricing/availability sync, and instant availability sync to prevent overbookings **[official/secondary]** (https://wheelsys.com/booking-engine/).
- **Rate display types** in the booking engine: standard rates, promotions & upgrades, rate plans, yield-managed rates, stop-sells **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/booking-engine/).
- Automated **upsell** of insurance packages, upgrades, extras, and **prepaid fuel**, with automated upsell pricing/billing **[official/secondary]** (https://wheelsys.com/booking-engine/; https://wheelsys.com/features/car-rental/).
- **XML interface** supports **send new reservation, cancel, poll status**, plus **instant prices with rates & availability including insurance and counter products** (e.g., Navigation, Baby seats) **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/sales/).
- Availability controls: post **stop-sales / free-sales** per group/location or per specific customer; auto-switch segments to **on-request** or **stop-sell** at high utilization **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/sales/).
- **Demo is sales-gated** (wheelsys.com/book-a-demo/), not a browsable public storefront. The live instance `ecisl.wheelsys.io/sign-in/` is a credential-gated **back-office login** ("Wheels Rental"), not a public booking flow — confirming `*.wheelsys.io` hosts per-tenant instances **[secondary]** (https://wheelsys.com/book-a-demo/; https://ecisl.wheelsys.io/sign-in/).
- Many Wheelsys storefronts' booking-engine UX (protection/extras/deposit screens, multi-gateway pay, B2B portal) is in practice **rendered by Carcloud**, which syncs reservation/availability/pricing with the Wheelsys backend in real time **[secondary]** (https://www.carcloud.com/car-rental-website-development/wheelsys/).

**Statuses (partial / inferred only):** Public sources reveal availability states **on-request** and **stop-sell**, and payment-method-bound agreement states, but **do not publish the reservation/contract lifecycle status enumeration** (quote/option/hold → confirmed → open agreement → on-rent → returned → no-show → cancelled → void → closed).

**Lifecycle detail remains thin.** The full reservation status set, option/hold expiry timers, and server-side price re-check tolerance are unconfirmed → GAPS. (Design analog: Wheelso enforces server-authoritative pricing with a €0.05 / HTTP 409 tolerance; expect an equivalent re-check here, value unknown.)

---

## 4) Rental agreement / contract (check-out & check-in, mileage/fuel/damage)

**Confirmed (platform features):**
- **Digital signature**, no paperwork/printers; signed docs sync instantly to the customer profile **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/).
- **Pre-arrival prep**: pre-fill customer data, verify documents, prepare contract before the customer arrives **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/).
- **Check-out/check-in records**: damage, fuel level, mileage (odometer), accessories, and more; **photos, notes, damage reports stored in the vehicle's history** (not just the contract) **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/car-rental/).
- **Field Service inspection flow**: "**Inspect, refuel & sign in 5 simple steps**" — exact phrasing confirmed, but the content of each of the 5 steps is **not** publicly enumerated (GAP). Mobile-friendly web view for remote deliveries/parking-lot turnaround **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/field-service/).
- **Field Service is a web app** ("all the tools needed for a field agent" — manage rentals, vehicle exchanges, inspect vehicles, issue new accident claims). **No Wheelsys-branded native app-store listing was found**; delivery appears to be mobile web. (The app-store "Wheels Mobile Assistant" is **Wheels, Inc.**, a different company — see disambiguation.) **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/field-service/).
- **One-click contract extension** auto-updates extra charges and dates **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/car-rental/).
- **Damage/claims**: log accidents, upload photos, track claims, **calculate damage charges**; integration with third-party **AI damage recognition / assessment / documentation** (vendor(s) unnamed) **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/car-rental/).
- **Financial sync**: all financial actions auto-update reservations, contracts, invoices **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/car-rental/).
- **Fines/violations** managed ("Fines Management" product tag) → post-return charge category **[secondary/inferred]** (https://sourceforge.net/software/product/Wheels-Car-Rental/).

**Confirmed (real tenant terms — Costa Rent a Car, `costa-web.wheelsys.io`; USD, tenant-specific, from search-index snippet of `/reservations/car-rental-terms.aspx`):** These prove the **shape** of contract/return rules the platform supports; the **amounts are per-tenant**, not Wheelsys global, and must not be assumed to match any other operator. **[secondary]** (https://costa-web.wheelsys.io/.../reservations/car-rental-terms.aspx):
- **Fuel policy:** return at same level as collection; shortfall charged **$35 per 1/8 tank** as a penalty; waived if "fuel tank prepaid" option is purchased.
- **One-way / drop-off fee:** applies to one-way rentals only, must be requested at rental time, **quoted per booking** (no fixed published rate).
- **Deposit / guarantee:** a valid credit card is required to cover the **guarantee + prepayment + total rental cost**; the hold is on a credit card; **no fixed amount published** (set per vehicle group / tenant).
- **After-hours delivery/collection:** available on request for **$150 USD**.
- **Late-return grace:** **29-minute** grace after expiry; beyond that, **at least one full rental day** is charged.
- **Driver requirements:** valid licence **held ≥ 1 year**; **basic Third Party Liability auto-included**.

**Design implication:** the contract engine must model fuel as a *fractional shortfall × unit penalty* (with a prepaid-fuel override), a *per-booking-quoted* one-way fee, a *credit-card guarantee hold* sized per group, an *after-hours surcharge*, and a *grace-window-then-full-day* late rule — all **tenant-configurable**.

**GAPS (remaining):** the content of the 5 inspection steps; whether a branded PDF contract is produced/emailed; the e-sign mechanism (in-house pad vs. DocuSign-class provider; legal audit trail); how fuel fraction/percentage is captured at the counter; mileage-overage charging logic; damage diagram/marker UI; damage-charge formula; the full named post-return fee catalogue; whether check-in **locks** the contract + computes final settlement + releases the deposit + auto-issues a closing invoice.

---

## 5) Fleet & vehicle management

**Confirmed:**
- Dedicated **Fleet Management** module: maintenance, insurance, **green cards** (international insurance certs), vehicle orders, inspections, allocations, cost control, telematics **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/fleet-management/).
- Consolidates **scheduled maintenance** (oil/filter/brakes, "fully configurable"), claims, traffic violations, toll passes **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/fleet-management/).
- **Rule-based allocation**: by class, make/model, **maintenance status**, location, or **custom rules** **[official/secondary]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/fleet-management/; https://softwarefinder.com/fleet-management-software/wheels-car-rental).
- **Centralized vehicle life-cycle DB** incl. maintenance schedules + **insurance renewals** for compliance/downtime control **[secondary]** (https://softwarefinder.com/...).
- **Availability calendar** shows **actual + forecasted** availability for any future point **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/we-yield/).
- **Auto availability update across channels** to prevent overbooking **[secondary]** (https://softwarefinder.com/...).
- **Field Service**: inventory, inspection/turnaround, fleet movements, claim recording **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/car-rental/).
- **Telematics** (RentalMatics named; bespoke cloud API, "plug & play," geo-fence alerts, off-road/repair/staff-use tracking) + **AI damage recognition** **[official/secondary]** (https://rentalmatics.com/solution/integrations-wheelsys-telematics/).

**Vehicle statuses (from overview copy):** available, rented, in preparation, in maintenance, overdue, damaged, locked (administrative) **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/car-rental/) — **but the authoritative in-app status set and transitions are unconfirmed (GAP).**

**Categorization / ACRISS:** ACRISS/SIPP grouping is **inferred** (required for GDS/broker XML) but **not explicitly named** on any public page → GAP **[inferred]** (https://wheelsys.com/sales/).

---

## 6) Pricing engine (rates / seasons / tariffs / duration tiers) & configurability

**Confirmed pricing constructs:**
- **Unlimited rate plans and rate codes** **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/).
- Rates managed in-app **or imported via Microsoft Excel** ("majority of rate elements"); changes propagate **instantly to all channels** (XML, websites, portals) **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/).
- Four distinct mechanisms: **dynamic rates, seasonal prices, discounts, corporate agreements** **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/).
- **Agreements** can bind to **pickup date OR booking date**; scope to **one/more stations** and **payment methods** (Pre-paid, full pre-paid, full credit, pay on arrival); enforce **max discount per user**; agreements priced below a defined **pricelist are shown in red** **[official]** (http://www.wheelsys.com/wheels/).
- **Capacity-linked auto rate shift** to optimize utilization; high-utilization → on-request / stop-sell at segment level **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/).
- **Rate API**: real-time rates to OTAs/brokers with **millisecond response** ("award-winning pricing API" — award name/year unverified) **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/).
- External dynamic pricing: **Rate-Highway** two-way real-time integration (Dec 21, 2021) + **RateGain** connection **[official/secondary]** (https://www.autorentalnews.com/10158346/...; https://wheelsys.com/rate-gain/). Yield via **WeYield** (claimed 94% reliability over a 30-day AI forecast — single-source/unverified) **[official/unverified]** (https://wheelsys.com/we-yield/).

**Configurability:** strongly **back-office, data-driven, no-code for standard setup** (Excel import + scoping + caps + auto-shift) **[inferred]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/).

**GAPS:** whether **duration-tier** (1–3 / 4–7 / weekly / monthly) and **day-of-week** pricing are explicit columns vs. expressed via seasons/dynamic rates; precedence/conflict resolution when season + agreement + coupon + dynamic rate overlap; Excel template columns and which elements are non-importable; native vs. external dynamic-pricing depth; currency/tax/rounding rules.

---

## 7) Fees, surcharges, extras, deposits, taxes

**Confirmed (platform):**
- Pricing module "supports the majority of car rental pricing elements" → fees modeled as configurable rate elements **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/).
- **Rate-management surcharges** explicitly include **age restrictions, airport taxes, city/county fees, discounts** **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/).
- **Extras/upsell**: insurance packages, upgrades, extras, **prepaid fuel** with automated pricing/billing **[official/secondary]** (https://wheelsys.com/booking-engine/; https://wheelsys.com/features/car-rental/).
- **Counter products** modeled distinctly (Navigation, Baby seats) **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/sales/).
- **VAT per extra**: extras carry with/without-VAT config (a review flags awkward reporting of this) **[secondary]** (https://www.capterra.com/p/141312/Wheels-Car-Rental/reviews/).
- **Second/additional driver** is a managed entity (same mandatory fields as the main driver) **[secondary]** (https://www.capterra.com/.../reviews/).
- **Deposits / pre-auth holds**: captured/secured instantly, **auto-released on return** ("deposit to refund") via **Viva.com** payments integration; **pay-by-link** supported; financial actions auto-update reservation/contract/invoice **[secondary]** (https://www.viva.com/en-eu/car-rental-payment-solutions-wheelsys; https://wheelsys.com/features/).
- **Tokenization** across gateways → enables post-rental charges (fines, damage, extra fuel) **[secondary]** (https://www.viva.com/...).
- **Split Billing** + **Fines Management** as product features **[secondary]** (https://sourceforge.net/...).
- Franchise **markups/overrides** layer fee/price adjustments per franchisee **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/platform/overview/).
- **Airport flight-arrival data** integration (relevant to after-hours/late-arrival handling; not itself an airport-surcharge object) **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/connections/).

**Confirmed (real tenant amounts — Costa Rent a Car, USD, tenant-specific; see Section 4 for the source caveat):** concrete proof that the platform supports these named fee types, with **operator-set amounts** **[secondary]** (https://costa-web.wheelsys.io/.../reservations/car-rental-terms.aspx):
- **Fuel shortfall:** $35 per 1/8 tank (prepaid-fuel override).
- **After-hours delivery/collection:** $150.
- **One-way/drop-off:** per-booking quote (no fixed figure).
- **Credit-card guarantee/deposit:** required, amount per group (not published).
- **Late return:** 29-min grace, then ≥ 1 day.

**GAPS (critical for a price-parity build):** no public confirmation of the **named after-hours window/free-at-boundary rule** (Costa publishes a flat $150, not a window), **one-way fee structure** beyond "quoted" (flat vs. station-pair matrix vs. distance), **young-driver fee** thresholds, a **distinct additional-driver fee** amount, an **airport/port surcharge object**, **delivery/collection fee** schedules, the **named extras catalog** (GPS, child seat, wifi, snow chains, roof box) and per-extra pricing model (per-day/per-rental/cap/included), **deposit/excess configuration** (amounts, refundable vs. not, per-group hold, CDW-reduction tiers), **global tax setup** (multiple VAT rates, inclusive/exclusive per channel/country, exemptions), **prepaid-fuel pricing model**, and **conditional fee logic** (waive above N days, channel-specific, non-domestic only). All amounts found are **tenant-specific (Costa Rica, USD)** and must not be assumed to match Wheelso's Greek/EUR rules.

---

## 8) Insurance / protection & excess

**Confirmed:**
- Insurance/protection sold as **priceable upsell products** with automated pricing/billing; returned via XML alongside counter products; promoted during the online booking flow **[official/secondary]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/car-rental/; https://wheelsys.com/booking-engine/).
- **Age-restriction surcharges** configurable in rate management **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/).
- Protection prices centrally managed and **published per customer/channel via XML** (server-owned, not client-computed) **[official/secondary]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/car-rental/; https://www.carcloud.com/car-rental-website-development/wheelsys/).
- **Damage/claims**: accident logging, photos, claim tracking, **damage-charge calculation** + AI damage recognition **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/fleet-management/).
- Fleet-side **own-vehicle insurance + green-card** tracking (distinct from renter protection) **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/fleet-management/).
- Tenant terms confirm a **basic Third Party Liability is auto-included** in the rental as the baseline protection layer (Costa tenant) **[secondary]** (https://costa-web.wheelsys.io/.../reservations/car-rental-terms.aspx).

**This section is thin on protection-product structure.** Public copy says "insurance packages" generically — it does **not** name CDW/SCDW/zero-excess tiers, **excess/deductible amounts**, how excess is stored (per group/rate/tier), the **damage-charge ↔ excess** formula, whether age **gates eligibility** (vs. surcharge only), the **claim status workflow**, per-channel protection price lists, or how roadside/tyre/windscreen/theft cover bundle. All → GAPS.

---

## 9) Promotions / discounts / vouchers

**Confirmed:**
- Native rate management arranges rates **seasonally including promotions, special offers, discount coupons** **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/).
- **Max discount per user** cap **[official]** (http://www.wheelsys.com/wheels/).
- Promo/agreement rates bind to **pickup vs. booking date**, to **stations**, to **payment methods** **[official]**.
- Likely modeled as **rate plans/codes** (given "unlimited rate plans/codes" + no public coupon-management screen) **[inferred]**.
- **Carcloud layer** adds **flexible promotions, single-use coupons, custom (reusable) discount codes**, **upgrade promotions**, relocations, scheduled deliveries with dynamic pricing; **loyalty tracking + marketing campaigns + segmentation + purchase tracking**; an **AI upselling engine**. Go-live **June 10, 2025**; available to all Wheelsys clients **[secondary]** (https://www.carcloud.com/car-rental-website-development/wheelsys/).
- **Voucher codes** as a **B2B settlement/redemption method** (distinct from promo discount codes) **[secondary]** (https://www.carcloud.com/b2b/).

**GAPS:** whether a true coupon object (redemption tracking, usage limits, expiry, per-customer caps) exists **natively** vs. **Carcloud-only**; discount mechanics (% vs. fixed, stacking, order vs. tax/fees, server authority); coupon constraints (min days/value, class restrictions, blackout windows, channel limits, quotas); enforcement of per-user max discount (agent vs. customer vs. agreement; approval workflow); whether a real **loyalty points/tiers program** exists vs. segmentation only; coupon lifecycle/audit; zero-value (100%-off) booking handling; whether promo validation is API-level or storefront-only.

---

## 10) Customers / CRM / drivers

**Confirmed (thin):**
- **Customer profiles** store signed documents and pre-filled data; **document-verification** integrations (365id, Acuant Compliance) for KYC at counter/online/counterless **[official/secondary]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/connections/; https://365id.com/en/integrations/wheelsys/).
- **Additional/second driver** is a managed entity (same mandatory fields as primary) **[secondary]** (https://www.capterra.com/.../reviews/).
- Tenant terms confirm **driver-eligibility capture**: valid licence **held ≥ 1 year** (Costa tenant) — implying licence-issue-date capture and an age/experience gate **[secondary]** (https://costa-web.wheelsys.io/.../reservations/car-rental-terms.aspx).
- **CRM/ERP** integration category exists **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/connections/).
- Marketing/loyalty CRM lives largely in the **Carcloud** layer (segmentation, email automation, login/CRM) **[secondary]** (https://www.carcloud.com/...).

**This section is thin from public data.** The native customer data model (fields, mandatory/optional, corporate vs. individual, driver-licence/expiry capture detail, blacklist/risk flags, GDPR consent fields) is undocumented → GAPS.

---

## 11) Invoicing, payments, gateways, refunds

**Confirmed:**
- **Automatic billing/invoicing**; all financial actions propagate to reservations/contracts/invoices; **split billing**; **credit-card processing** **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/).
- **Payment methods on agreements**: Pre-paid, full pre-paid, full credit, pay-on-arrival **[official]** (http://www.wheelsys.com/wheels/).
- **Pay-by-link**; automated deposit & financial management **[secondary]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/).
- **Gateways (tokenized)**: Stripe, Windcave, Moneris, USAePAY, Worldpay (Worldpay for Enterprise), PayPal, and **Viva.com** (deposit pre-auth + auto-release) **[official/secondary]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/connections/; https://www.viva.com/...).
- **Registered VISA agent** on a **PCI-DSS certified cloud** **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/cloud/gsip/).
- **Accounting integrations**: 60+ out of the box (earlier copy said 40+), growing monthly; named: QuickBooks, Odoo **[official/secondary]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/connections/).
- **Fiscalization**: Italy, Bulgaria, Costa Rica, Turkey, Greece, Croatia, Bosnia, and more **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/connections/).
- **Refunds**: deposit hold auto-releases on return ("deposit to refund") **[secondary]** (https://www.viva.com/...).
- Tenant terms confirm a **prepayment + guarantee + total** credit-card model at the operator level (Costa tenant) **[secondary]** (https://costa-web.wheelsys.io/.../reservations/car-rental-terms.aspx).

**GAPS:** invoice/credit-note numbering & templates; refund/credit-note workflow beyond deposit release; multi-currency settlement; how pay-on-arrival vs. prepaid drives capture timing; reconciliation of discounted/zero-value bookings.

---

## 12) Channel / OTA / broker / B2B & API

**Confirmed:**
- **Out-of-the-box** connections to major **OTAs, Car Brokers, GDS** **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/connections/).
- Named **GDS/distribution**: Amadeus, Galileo, Apollo, Worldspan, Travelport/MyTravelport **[secondary]** (https://www.getapp.com/retail-consumer-services-software/a/wheels-car-rental/).
- **Real-time rate engine** to OTAs/brokers (millisecond) **[official]**.
- **XML interface**: send/cancel/poll reservations; instant prices incl. insurance & counter products; stop-/free-sales per group/location/customer **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/sales/).
- **Named Wheelsys API** (Carcloud "full Wheelsys API integration"; UFOFLEET real-time API; Rate-Highway/WeYield two-way) **[secondary]** (https://www.carcloud.com/...).
- **Self-service/counterless**: UFOFLEET (Nov 6, 2023; phone-as-key, ICE + EV; UFOFLEET reaches CarTrawler) **[secondary]** (https://ufofleet.com/news/...).
- **B2B/agent portal**: dedicated corporate/insurance portal, per-corporate rates & booking rules, employee self-registration, B2B payment rules (invoice/bill-to, card, pay-on-pickup, split-billing, **voucher codes**, PO) — **evidenced via Carcloud, not confirmed native** **[secondary]** (https://www.carcloud.com/b2b/). A distinct **broker/agent portal** product exists (`cruiseagent.wheelsys.io` "Cruise.Agent.Portal") **[inferred]**.

**Custom interface mechanism:** web services, static files, or XML, **content/structure tailorable per client** — **no public self-serve REST/OpenAPI** **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/connections/).

**GAPS:** native vs. Carcloud-delivered B2B portal; exact named OTAs/brokers; native agent / net-vs-gross / commissionable / markup rate config; API protocol/auth/endpoints/rate-limits/sandbox/public docs; per-channel parity/markup/allocation; channel-booking statuses & modify/cancel push-back/no-show; whether channel manager/booking engine/API are base vs. paid add-ons; whether overbooking-prevention is native or Carcloud-only.

---

## 13) Multi-location / multi-company & users / roles / permissions

**Confirmed:**
- **Multi-location core architecture**: thousands of vehicles across airports/downtown/partner locations in one system; agencies of every size up to multi-country franchise **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/platform/overview/).
- **Subdomain-per-tenant** isolation (`<tenant>.wheelsys.io/sign-in/`); separate agent-portal subdomain; tenant terms also served per-subdomain (`<tenant>-web.wheelsys.io/reservations/...`), confirming **per-tenant config of terms/fees** **[official/secondary]** (https://ecisl.wheelsys.io/sign-in/; https://costa-web.wheelsys.io/.../reservations/car-rental-terms.aspx).
- **Microsoft SSO** (Azure AD) on staff sign-in; back office is **ASP.NET** (`default.aspx`, `/ui/` shell, `(S(...))` session token in URLs) **[official/inferred]** (https://ecisl.wheelsys.io/sign-in/).
- **Permission-scoped reporting** (users see only allowed data) **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/).
- **Multi-operation switcher** within one session (review-confirmed) **[secondary]** (https://www.capterra.com/.../reviews/).
- **Franchise**: markups/overrides per franchisee; automated monthly statements; **bi-directional XML only with franchisee locations also running Wheels** **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/platform/overview/).
- **Unified reporting + fleet pools** across rental & leasing in one tenant **[official]**.
- Security posture: PCI-DSS cloud, access control, incident logging, monitoring/audit/pen-tests; **GDPR DPA** in the Master Subscription Agreement, sub-processor liability, customer on-site audit rights **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/cloud/gsip/; https://wheelsys.com/cloud/gdpr/).

**Tension to resolve:** marketing implies permission-scoped access, but a reviewer reports **"you can't often limit rights to users"** → granularity disputed **[secondary]** (https://www.capterra.com/.../reviews/).

**Entity structure note:** at least three legal entities share the name — **WHEELSYS Α.Ε.** (GEMI 601000259920, the domestic operating S.A.), **WHEELSYS LTD** (GEMI 300000591078, likely foreign/branch), and **WHEELSYS LTD Cyprus** (HE294355). Which is the contracting/billing entity per region is unconfirmed → GAP **[secondary]** (https://findbiz.gr/el/company/wheelsys-sa/601000259920).

**GAPS:** named roles vs. per-user toggles; permission catalogue & object level (module/screen/field/action/report); whether one account spans multiple companies with per-entity permissions; "company" data model (separate tenant vs. sub-entity vs. location code) and segregation; franchise markup config granularity & statement format; MFA/password policy/session timeout/IP allow-list/user-action audit log; whether integrations respect per-user scoping; user/location/company limits and seat/location pricing.

---

## 14) Reporting & analytics

**Confirmed:**
- "Wealth of reports, dashboards and automated notifications" **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/).
- **Drag-and-drop customizable reports** (no-code) **[official]**.
- **Export in many formats** (specific formats not named), print, email **[official]**.
- **Scheduled inbox delivery** of reports **[official]**.
- **Real-time dashboards** + **alerts/notifications** engine (distinct from scheduled reports) **[official]**.
- Optional **Microsoft Power BI** downstream feed **[official]**; **Tableau**, Oribi cited as BI integrations **[secondary]**.
- **Permission-scoped** reporting **[official]**.

**GAPS:** exact export formats (PDF/XLSX/CSV/XML?); full built-in report catalogue (utilization, revenue, fleet aging, damage/insurance, contract analytics); whether report-builder/alert-rules are fully self-service no-code; Power BI mechanics (connector vs. feed vs. embedded; included vs. add-on).
**Exclusion:** FleetView / IFRS-leasing reporting found in search belongs to **Wheels, Inc. / wheels.com — a different company — and is excluded.**

---

## 15) Technology, hosting, integrations, webhooks

**Confirmed:**
- **Cloud/SaaS only**, web-based, auto-updates off-peak; back office **ASP.NET / Windows stack** (inferred from `.aspx` + `(S(...))` session tokens) **[official/inferred]** (https://wheelsys.com/cloud/; https://ecisl.wheelsys.io/sign-in/).
- Security: PCI-DSS cloud, continuous monitoring, automated backups, redundant infrastructure (vendor self-statements; **no named SOC 2 / ISO 27001**) **[official/secondary]** (https://wheelsys.com/cloud/gsip/).
- **13 integration categories**: Rate Analytics & Management; Connected Cars; Document Verification; Data Providers; Payment Gateways; Brand Connections; OTA/GDS; GDS; Franchise & Affiliate Networks; Accounting; Collections & Billing; Fiscalization; Surveys & NPS **[official]** (https://wheelsys.com/features/connections/).
- Integration mechanism: **web services, static files, XML**, tailorable; **no public webhook/event docs**; named real-world APIs are **partner-mediated** (Carcloud, Rate-Highway, RentalMatics, UFOFLEET) **[official/secondary]**.
- Hardware: **self-service kiosks & key dispensers**; **telematics**; **AI damage recognition**; **airport flight-arrival data** **[official]**.

**Disambiguation / exclusion:** the **OutSystems** case study ("Wheels custom fleet-management solutions") concerns **Wheels, Inc. (US leasing)**, a **different company**, and is **excluded** from Wheelsys's stack assessment **[unverified]** (https://www.outsystems.com/case-studies/wheels-custom-fleet-management-solutions/).

**GAPS:** webhook/event support; public developer portal / OpenAPI / auth scheme / rate limits / sandbox; language/framework/DB/cloud provider; single- vs. multi-tenant data architecture; data residency/region options; on-prem availability (none advertised); security-certification scope (ISO/SOC registry entry not found, only searched indirectly).

---

## 16) Wheelsys's own pricing tiers, target market, reviews

**Pricing (mostly unverified — no public price across any source):**
- **Quote-based / request-a-quote** across Capterra, GetApp, Software Advice, SourceForge, SoftwareSuggest, TechnologyCounter; Wheelsys self-positions "common-sense pricing, affordable for small and medium operators"; **no public price list, no per-vehicle/per-user figure** located anywhere **[secondary]** (https://www.capterra.com/p/141312/Wheels-Car-Rental/).
- **SourceForge** has a product page (vendor "Invensys") with **no pricing, no reviews** (0.0/5, "be the first to review") **[official]** (https://sourceforge.net/software/product/Wheels-Car-Rental/).
- **No G2 profile** (only generic category pages + an unrelated "Wheels" product) and **no TrustRadius profile** were found → no pricing/ratings there **[inferred]** (https://www.g2.com/products/car-rental-software/reviews).
- The widely-circulated **$3.99–$120/month** range and **$10,000–$25,000 implementation** are explicitly **industry benchmarks, NOT actual Wheelsys pricing** **[unverified]** (https://softwarefinder.com/fleet-management-software/wheels-car-rental).
- GetApp's catalog flags (free trial / free version / "$50/mo start") are **inconsistent** with the quote-based reality and should be treated cautiously **[unverified]** (https://www.getapp.com/retail-consumer-services-software/a/wheels-car-rental/).
- Reviewer note: **API access is paid for existing users** **[secondary]** (https://www.capterra.com/.../reviews/).

**Target market:** rental agencies, operating-leasing companies, corporate fleets, multi-country franchises; expanding into the Americas/US; positioned as a trusted European rental platform **[secondary]** (https://www.capterra.com/p/141312/Wheels-Car-Rental/).

**Reviews:**
- **Capterra ~4.4/5 (14 reviews)**; **GetApp ~15 verified reviews**; ~4.7 on Capterra's alternatives page (13 reviews) — statistically thin vs. competitors **[secondary]** (https://www.capterra.com/p/141312/Wheels-Car-Rental/reviews/; https://www.getapp.com/...).
- **PROS**: feature-rich/advanced; automates daily ops; strong reporting; responsive/devoted support; "good value for the money"; training via live online/webinars/docs/videos **[secondary]**.
- **CONS**: poor **Android** compatibility; **paid API**; loss of end-user **template editor**; some old functionality removed; difficulty managing extras with/without VAT in reports; second-driver field rigidity; currency/decimal issues; fleet-chart rigidity **[secondary]**.
- **Support channels**: Email/Help Desk, FAQ/Forum, Knowledge Base, Phone, 24/7 Live Rep, Chat **[secondary]**.
- **Competitor benchmark**: Navotar/RENTALL 4.7 (142), HQ Rental 4.8 (78), Wheels 4.7 (13). Bluebird merged Thermeon + Navotar into "RENTALL" (2024) with reported post-merger bugs — a competitive opening **[secondary]**.

---

## GAPS — must confirm in-app (consolidated)

**Company / commercial**
1. Authoritative installed-base figures (operators vs. locations vs. countries conflict: 800/76, 1,000+/100+, 1,200+/110+, 1,300+/120+, 4,000 locations/82).
2. Founding year (2003 vs. 2004); Wheelsys ↔ Invensys ↔ "Wheels Car Rental System" branding history.
3. Real subscription pricing: tiers, per-location/per-vehicle/per-user/flat, currency, minimums; whether $3.99–$120 / $50/mo apply at all (they're benchmarks).
4. Whether a genuine free trial / free version exists (conflicting catalog data).
5. Operating Leasing licensing/cost; Franchise Management packaging; whether Reporting/Customer Management are bundled vs. separate.
6. API access pricing (reviewer says paid for existing users).
7. Security-certification scope (SOC 2 / ISO 27001 / PCI-DSS scope beyond tokenization) — no certificate-registry entry found.
8. **ΑΦΜ (VAT number)** of WHEELSYS Α.Ε. (GEMI 601000259920) — not recovered; read directly from findbiz.gr / publicity.businessportal.gr.
9. **Audited ισολογισμός** (turnover, profit, equity, headcount) for any specific year — only third-party revenue estimates (~$4–5.4M) and headcount estimates (37–50) exist; pull filed statements from ΓΕΜΗ publicity under GEMI 601000259920.
10. **Corporate-group structure** — which of WHEELSYS Α.Ε. (601000259920), WHEELSYS LTD (300000591078), and WHEELSYS LTD Cyprus (HE294355) is the operating/contracting/billing entity per region.
11. **Halcyon deal terms** — euro amount, valuation/enterprise value, and exact minority-stake percentage (all undisclosed by every party and press, incl. capital.gr).
12. Award name/year behind "award-winning pricing API"; sources of "94% WeYield reliability" and "96%+ retention" claims (single-source/unverified).

**Reservations / booking**
13. Full reservation/contract status enumeration & transitions (quote/option/hold → confirmed → on-rent → returned → no-show → cancelled → void → closed).
14. Option/hold expiry timers; permission gates on creating/overriding reservations.
15. Server-side price re-check tolerance (Wheelso analog: €0.05 / 409).
16. Booking-engine: embed vs. hosted detail; deposit/pre-auth flow at checkout; white-label theming depth; per-location/per-channel config; multi-currency/multi-language coverage; whether protection selection is a mandatory step or optional upsell.
17. Whether the storefront protection/extras/deposit UX is native Wheelsys or **Carcloud-rendered** (no public self-serve demo storefront exists; demo is sales-gated, `ecisl.wheelsys.io` is an operator login).

**Contract / inspection**
18. The 5 inspection steps' content; branded PDF contract generation/email; e-sign mechanism & legal audit trail.
19. Fuel policies generalized beyond the Costa tenant ($35 per 1/8 + prepaid override) — full-to-full / prepaid / service options; fraction/percentage capture granularity; auto-refuel pricing.
20. Mileage-overage enforcement/charging; odometer auto-fill from telematics.
21. Damage diagram/marker UI, mandatory photo counts, severity categories, configurable checklists.
22. Damage-charge calculation logic (rate tables vs. estimates vs. excess); auto-apply vs. approval; which AI damage-recognition vendor(s) are integrated (unnamed).
23. Post-return fee catalogue (cleaning, late, smoking, lost key, toll/fine admin) and back-office configurability; late-return rule beyond the Costa 29-min-then-1-day pattern.
24. Whether check-in locks contract + final settlement + deposit release + closing invoice.
25. Kiosk vs. counter sharing the same contract/inspection objects; unattended return inspection.
26. Field-level data model for contract/inspection/claim records.
27. Whether Wheelsys field service ships a packaged native app or is purely mobile-web (no Wheelsys-branded store listing found; "Wheels Mobile Assistant" is the unrelated Wheels, Inc. app — confirm the disambiguation before relying on any of its feature copy).

**Fleet**
28. ACRISS/SIPP support as a configurable group/channel field.
29. Authoritative vehicle status set & transitions.
30. Maintenance-scheduling specifics (km/time intervals, work orders, vendor assignment, cost capture, auto-block from availability).
31. Document-expiry reminders (which docs: insurance, green card, KTEO/MOT, registration/road tax, lease; lead-times; channels; configurable thresholds).
32. Utilization threshold for auto on-request/stop-sell; configurability/granularity.
33. Availability-calendar screen structure; overbooking buffers; forecast-overlay controls.
34. Fleet-planning/forecast screen existence & fields.
35. "Vehicle orders" procurement-to-onboarding workflow scope.
36. Telematics fields consumed (mileage/GPS/fuel/ignition/geofence) & maintenance auto-trigger.
37. Limits: max fleet/groups/locations; multi-company fleet segregation.

**Pricing / fees / tax**
38. Duration-tier and day-of-week pricing as explicit fields vs. season/dynamic.
39. Rate-construct precedence/conflict resolution; rounding; multi-currency per station/channel.
40. Excel import template/columns; non-importable elements; additive vs. overwrite.
41. Native vs. external (Rate-Highway/RateGain) dynamic-pricing depth.
42. After-hours fee (windows, free-at-boundary — Costa shows flat $150, not a window); one-way/drop-off fee (flat/matrix/distance — Costa quotes per booking); young-driver fee thresholds; distinct additional-driver fee amount; airport/port surcharge object; delivery/collection fee.
43. Named extras catalog + per-extra pricing model (per-day/per-rental/cap/included).
44. Deposit/excess configuration (amounts, refundable, per-group hold, CDW-reduction tiers) — Costa confirms a credit-card guarantee with no published amount.
45. Global tax/VAT setup (multiple rates, inclusive/exclusive per channel/country, exemptions).
46. Prepaid-fuel pricing model (Costa confirms a prepaid override exists; price not published).
47. Conditional fee logic (waive above N days, channel-specific, non-domestic only).

**Insurance / protection**
48. Named protection tiers (CDW/SCDW/zero-excess) beyond the auto-included Third Party Liability baseline; number configurable.
49. Excess/deductible storage (per group/rate/tier; per location/currency).
50. Damage-charge ↔ excess ↔ waiver formula.
51. Whether age gates eligibility (not just surcharge); min/max thresholds; licence-held-duration gate generalized beyond Costa's "≥ 1 year."
52. Claim status workflow & required fields.
53. Whether protection prices reprice dynamically; per-channel protection price lists.
54. Roadside/tyre/windscreen/theft as separate vs. bundled.

**Promotions**
55. Native coupon object (redemption tracking, usage limits, expiry, per-customer caps) vs. rate-plan modeling vs. Carcloud-only.
56. Discount mechanics (% vs. fixed, stacking, order vs. tax/fees, server authority).
57. Coupon constraints (min days/value, class, blackout, channel, quotas).
58. Max-discount-per-user enforcement & approval workflow.
59. Real loyalty program vs. segmentation only.
60. Coupon/promo lifecycle & audit; zero-value booking handling.
61. Promo validation at API vs. storefront.

**Customers / CRM**
62. Native customer/driver data model (fields, mandatory/optional, corporate vs. individual, licence/expiry, blacklist/risk, GDPR consent).
63. Whether loyalty/marketing CRM is native vs. Carcloud-only.

**Invoicing / payments**
64. Invoice/credit-note numbering & templates; refund workflow beyond deposit release; multi-currency settlement; capture timing by payment method; discounted/zero-value reconciliation.

**Channel / API / B2B**
65. Native vs. Carcloud B2B agent portal; exact named OTAs/brokers.
66. Native agent / net-vs-gross / commissionable / markup rate config.
67. API protocol/auth/endpoints/rate-limits/sandbox/public docs; OTA-XML certification.
68. Per-channel parity/markup/allocation; channel-booking statuses & modify/cancel push-back/no-show.
69. Whether channel manager/booking engine/API are base vs. paid add-ons; per-channel/transaction fees.
70. Native overbooking/allocation logic vs. Carcloud-only.

**Multi-tenant / roles**
71. Roles vs. per-user toggles; permission catalogue & object level; disputed granularity (branch restriction, hide pricing, restrict refunds/voids — reviewer says rights often can't be limited).
72. Company data model (tenant vs. sub-entity vs. location code) & segregation; single account spanning entities with per-entity permissions.
73. Franchise markup config granularity; statement format; non-Wheels franchisee support.
74. MFA/password policy/session timeout/IP allow-list/user-action audit log; whether integrations respect per-user scoping.
75. User/location/company limits; seat/location pricing.

**Reporting / tech / hosting**
76. Exact export formats; full built-in report catalogue; no-code boundary for report/alert builder; Power BI mechanics & pricing.
77. Webhook/event support; public developer portal/OpenAPI/auth/rate-limits/sandbox.
78. Tech stack (language/framework/DB), cloud provider, single- vs. multi-tenant architecture, data residency, on-prem availability.

**Verification caveat**
79. **Nearly all "official"-page facts derive from search-engine snippets.** wheelsys.com, nstv1.wheelsys.com (DNS failure), all `*.wheelsys.io` tenant terms/login pages (HTTP 403 without a live ASP.NET `(S(...))` session token), review sites (Capterra/GetApp/Software Advice/SourceForge/SoftwareFinder), capital.gr and the rest of the Greek press, findbiz.gr / D&B / RocketReach / CB Insights, halcyonequitypartners.com, Carcloud, and the App/Play stores all returned 403 / DNS failures at the egress proxy. The Costa-tenant fee figures ($35 per 1/8 fuel, $150 after-hours, 29-min grace, credit-card guarantee, TPL auto-included, licence ≥ 1 year) come from a **search index snippet of a single tenant (Costa Rent a Car, USD)** and are **tenant-specific** — re-verify every figure against live pages and confirm everything inside a Wheelsys tenant/demo before relying on it. Capital.gr-only soft claims (96%+ retention, demand forecasting on real market data) and all third-party financial/headcount estimates are single-source/unverified.
